rulings.Case Title: TRINITY PROPERTY GROUP, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al VS. SHAWN P COLLINS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 24, 2010, line 5, CROSS-DEFENDANT TRINITY PROPERTY GROUP, FAIRWAY PRINCIPAL PARTNERS LLC, RUSSELL BACON, PAIGE BACON, FAIRWAY TRI-COUNTY LLC, FAIRWAY WILLOW PLAZA LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT CAUSE OF ACTION. DENIED AS TO CONVERSION AND BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY CAUSES OF ACTION. MOTION MOOT AS TO EQUITABLE INDEMNITY AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY PROPERTY GROUP, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al VS. SHAWN P COLLINS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 24, 2010, line 5, CROSS-DEFENDANTS TRINITY PROPERTY GROUP, FAIRWAY PRINCIPAL PARTNERS LLC, RUSSELL BACON, PAIGE BACON, FAIRWAY TRI-COUNTY LLC, FAIRWAY WILLOW PLAZA LLC'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DECLARATORY JUDGMENT AND BREACH OF WRITTEN CONTRACT CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD THE SUBSTANCE OF THE TERMS OF THE CONTRACT MORE CLEARLY. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE COLLINS DOES NOT ALLEGE OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT OR SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS BECAUSE THE TORT IS NEGLIGENCE, THE CROSS-COMPLAINT DESCRIBES INTENTIONAL CONDUCT, AND COLLINS DOES NOT ALLEGE SEVERE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. NO REASONABLE POSSIBILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. OVERRULED AS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: YUAN CHAO LU VS. JMA CONASTRUCTION INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 24, 2010, line 11, DEFENDANT JMA CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST UNAMBIGUOUSLY PLEAD THE DATES WHEN PLAINITIFF ALLEGEDLY WAS NOT PAID ALL OF THE WAGES HE LAWFULLY EARNED, AND WHEN HE WORKED ON PUBLIC WORKS PROJECTS FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THE AMOUNT OF WAGES OWED. (SEE CACI 2700; 2701) =(302/CWW)
